since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.50%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.30% · BTC +1.17% · Gold -0.43% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.50%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.50%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +15.31%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +15.31%, META +5.11%, NVDA +3.54%, UEC +3.25%, AMAT +2.83%. Laggards: OKTA -5.70%, S -5.70%, RXRX -5.66%, CRWD -5.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.22% at $148.78
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
